title: Add Widgets from Project Overview to Dashboard tools

posts.author: noemiPOM (Noemi)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’d love the ability to add the widgets from the Project Overview onto any dashboard. I don’t really understand why you can’t draw data from the portfolio like text columns or other project details.

Basically what I’m looking to do is build a report that includes both amalgamated data (currently possible) as well as project-specific data (not possible to do as easily as Project Overview). Is that possible?
